summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Metaverse Nomads #135 Star Atlas w/ @Crosschain_Sal
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #118
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
STAR ATLAS #222 HUGE ANNOUNCEMENTS INCOMING!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about upcoming Star Atlas announcements.
Star Atlas TV posted replay videos of Star Atlas Community Week
community week part 1: The Kickoff
community week part 2: Townhall #42
community week part 3: The Atlas Brew #100
community week part 4: COPA
community week part 5: Joni Awards
Beth posted recaps of Star Atlas Community Week
Star Atlas Community Week: Kickoff Event – TLDR
Star Atlas Community Week: Townhall #42 – TLDR
Star Atlas Community Week: Atlas Brew #100 – TLDR
Star Atlas Community Week: COPA – TLDR
Star Atlas Community Week: Joni Awards – TLDR
TOWN HALL REPORT – FEBRUARY 27, 2024
Aephia published an article about the latest Star Atlas Townhall.
STAR ATLAS TOWN HALL RECAP- HUGE UPDATES! Feb 2024
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video recapping the Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Townhall #42 (9 min RECAP), Feb 2024
RahMega posted a video recapping the Star Atlas Townhall.
Key Takeaways From The 42nd Star Atlas Community Townhall
Hologram News Network published an article about key takeaways from the Star Atlas Townhall.
Aephia Crowned As 2024 Star Atlas COPA Champions
Hologram News Network published an article about the winners from the Star Atlas COPA presentations.
Star Atlas Community Week TRIBUTE!!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video tribute to Star Atlas Community Week.
